docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNROE, LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, BRYN $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $245.00, DEFENDANT DEDUCTION FOR DEEP CLEANING OF $350 WAS EXCESSIVE BY $200. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $747.01 FILED BY MUNROE, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, BRYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LEE MUNROE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYN SMITH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNROE, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, BRYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-18-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, BRYN
